Smart Switch

5 products

1 Gang Display Light switch

HZ-LT-SPOTLT01

Light becomes effortless. One touch transforms every moment at home.

Specifications

Name: Screen display Lighting switch | Standard: UK, EU standard | Control button: 1gang | Input voltage: 100V-240V AC 50-60HZ | Communication method: WiFi, ZigBee | WIFI standard: 802.11b/g/n 2.4GHZ ...

Smart switch PC

HZ-SS-CONACC02

Transform any space into a responsive, connected room with one sleek wall tap. Smart switch PC puts instant command of lights, fans, and outlets at your fingertips.

Specifications

Colors: Grey, Black, White | Control: 4 street lamp control | Power supply mode: zero live wire | Rated voltage: AC100V - 240V 50 ~ 60Hz | Operating temperature: -20℃-45℃ | Working humidity: ≤ 85% RH ...

zigbee switchsmart switchPC switchlamp controllerhome automation
